args.code: (() => { const nameInput = document.querySelector('input[name="repository[name]"]') || document.querySelector('input[data-testid="repository-name-input"]') || [...document.querySelectorAll('input')].find(i => i.placeholder && i.placeholder.includes('name')); const descInput = document.querySelector('input[name="repository[description]"]') || [...document.querySelectorAll('input')].find(i => i.placeholder && i.placeholder.includes('description')); const createBtn = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.textContent && b.textContent.includes('Create repository')); return {name: nameInput ? {tag: nameInput.tagName, found: true} : {found: false}, desc: descInput ? {found: true} : {found: false}, create: createBtn ? {tag: createBtn.tagName, text: createBtn.textContent.trim().substring(0,30), found: true} : {found: false}}; })()
